content:
守密人可將作品按投稿要求發佈在官方Discord、Facebook、巴哈姆特或YouTube等任意社群平臺。
🔹發佈作品後請把鏈接填到下方問卷，才能參與後續評選和發獎：https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/xYQgm9WN
🔹V2.2.2 公告：https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1375487996886777866

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Each keeper can publish your work on any social platform such as the official Discord, Facebook, Bahamut or YouTube according to the submission requirements.
🔹After publishing your work, please fill in the link in the questionnaire below to participate in the subsequent selection and awarding :https://wj.qookkagames.com/p/xYQgm9WN
🔹V2.2.2 Announcement: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1375487996886777866
🔹The submission period is from May 26th to June 29th (UTC+8)
🍀  The English rules have been posted in the comment section
